notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

meta.title: PLAYBACK Academy — Subscription & Member Management for Clubs
meta.description: Run your academy on PLAYBACK. Subscription billing, member access, recording delivery, and player development tools for football clubs and academies. Used by 25+ clubs across 10+ countries.
meta.ogTitle: PLAYBACK Academy — Subscription & Member Management for Clubs
meta.ogDescription: Subscription billing, member access, and recording delivery for football clubs and academies.

clubPage.metaDescription: Subscribe to {name} on PLAYBACK to unlock match recordings, training clips, and analysis from every fixture.
clubPage.introHierarchical: Pick your club to see the age groups available for subscription. Each subscription unlocks match recordings, training clips, and analysis from every fixture this season.
clubPage.introFlat: Subscribe to your team and unlock match recordings, training clips, and analysis from every fixture this season — delivered to your PLAYBACK account, accessible from any device.
clubPage.cancelledHierarchical: Checkout cancelled. Pick a club below to try again.
clubPage.cancelledFlat: Checkout cancelled. Pick a team below to try again.
clubPage.noTeamsTitle: {name} hasn't opened any teams for subscription yet.
clubPage.noTeamsHint: New teams usually go live before the season starts. Check back soon.
clubPage.paymentsNote: Payments are processed by Stripe. After successful checkout you'll be invited to claim your PLAYBACK account — your subscription is held against the email address you provide.

picker.pickPrompt: Pick a club above to see the age groups available for subscription.
picker.noAgeGroupsTitle: {name} hasn't opened any age groups for subscription yet.
picker.noAgeGroupsHint: New age groups usually go live before the season starts. Check back soon.

checkout.invalidSelection: Something looked wrong with that team selection — please refresh and try again.
checkout.teamNotFound: We couldn't find that team — please refresh the page and try again.
checkout.busy: Checkout is busy right now — please try again in a moment.
checkout.unavailable: Checkout is unavailable right now — please try again in a few minutes.

onboarding.title: Academy Onboarding
onboarding.description: Players, parents, and staff can now have a shared ecosystem where growth is promoted, moments are analysed, and memories are preserved. POWERED by PLAYBACK.
onboarding.signUpBody: Select your academy from the PLAYBACK Academy Services list below and sign up for a subscription. Upon successful sign up, you will be invited to the ClubHouse via e-mail to access the platform.
onboarding.accessBody: Following successful onboarding to the PLAYBACK ClubHouse, you will be able to access your team's data, content, and analytics by signing in through <link>app.veo.co</link> using your chosen credentials.
onboarding.profileBody: Players will be able to create their Player Profile which will be used as a repository of the player's details, stats, and highlights - all in a shareable format.
onboarding.contentBody: Onboarded players & parents can access their team's footage, create clips, add highlights to the Player Profile, share content, and interact with the coaching staff via @ mentions to discuss plays and celebrate achievements.

clubs.lyl: Pick your club from across the London Youth League and subscribe to your age group — match recordings, training clips, and analysis from every fixture.
clubs.sefa: With venue coverage at Star Meadow Sports Complex, SEFA players now have access to the PLAYBACK services.
clubs.cfa: JPL & Mezzie Youth teams can now access the PLAYBACK services across their venues.
clubs.maestros: Select Maestros Academy teams can now access the PLAYBACK services across both of their venues.
clubs.hb: Select Hollands & Blair teams are able to utilize the PLAYBACK infrastructure to access their match footage at Star Meadow Sports Complex.
clubs.maidstone: We have partnered with Maidstone United to provide their players with the PLAYBACK Academy service.
clubs.sefaWomen: With venue coverage at Star Meadow Sports Complex, SEFA Women players now have access to the PLAYBACK services.

meta.title: PLAYBACK Tournament — Broadcast & Competition Management
meta.description: Run tournaments on PLAYBACK. Broadcast every match, manage fixtures and registrations, and deliver recordings to every player and parent. Trusted by youth and grassroots competitions worldwide.
meta.ogDescription: Broadcast every match, manage fixtures, and deliver recordings to every player and parent.

onboarding.title: Tournament Onboarding
onboarding.description: Players, parents, and staff can now have a shared platform moments are shared and memories are preserved. POWERED by PLAYBACK.
onboarding.signUpBody: Select your tournament from the PLAYBACK Tournament Services list below and sign up for a subscription. Upon successful sign up, you will receive an email with a link to the tournament folder/all games within 24 hours.
onboarding.contentBody: Onboarded players & parents can access their team's footage, create clips, export highlights, share content, and celebrate achievements.

items.ramadan: Access your tournament footage and data with AI-detected highlights and AutoFollow technology.
items.atomics: Get a personalised folder with your tournament footage and data with AI-detected highlights and AutoFollow technology.
items.comingSoon: The PLAYBACK team is continuously working on POWERING new tournaments. If you would like to be part of the PLAYBACK ecosystem, REACH OUT!

register.academySubtitle: Thanks for subscribing to <club>{clubName}</club>. Set a password to access your team's recordings.
register.usernameInvalid: Username must be 3-30 characters, letters, numbers, underscore, and hyphens only
register.emailLocked: Locked to the email you used at checkout. To use a different email, contact support.

verifyEmail.instructions: Please check your inbox (and spam folder) and click the link to activate your account.
verifyEmail.closeHint: You can close this window after verifying. Once done, sign in with your credentials.

serverErrors.invalid_credentials: Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials and try again.
serverErrors.email_not_confirmed: Please check your email and click the confirmation link before signing in.

serverErrors.email_rate_limit: Too many emails sent. Please wait before requesting another.
serverErrors.username_taken: This username is already taken. Please choose a different username.

page.createPlayerDescription: Set up your football player profile to showcase your skills.
page.editProfileDescription: Update your profile details across modules.
page.uploadHighlightDescription: Add a video highlight to your profile.
page.uploadTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Match Highlights vs FC United
page.careerDialogDescription: Add your clubs, academies, or team history.
page.educationDialogDescription: Add your schools, colleges, or courses.
page.importPlayhubDescription: Add match recordings you have access to as profile highlights.
page.noRecordingsHint: Purchase match recordings on PLAYHUB to import them here.

modules.title: Your modules
modules.empty: No profiles yet. Set up a player or coach profile to start receiving attributed clips from clubs.
modules.editTitle: Edit {label} — opens the global editor (per-module editing coming soon)

access.empty: No subscriptions or purchased recordings yet. Match recordings you buy or are granted access to will appear here.

verifications.title: Verifications
verifications.empty: No verifications yet. A club admin can verify you from their roster page — once they do, the badge appears on your public profile and here.

emptyState.titleHasVariant: Waiting for your first match clips
emptyState.titleNoVariant: Set up your profile to start receiving clips
emptyState.bodyHasVariant: Your clips arrive automatically. After your next match, every moment with your shirt number on it lands here — no upload required.
emptyState.bodyNoVariant: Create your player profile first. As soon as your club records a match and tags your number, your clips will land here automatically.
emptyState.tip: If nothing’s shown up after a match, ask your coach to confirm your shirt number for the next one. Footage usually appears within a few hours of full-time.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Control who sees your profile and how PLAYBACK reaches you.
settings.moduleVisibilityDescription: Each module on your profile has its own visibility. Public modules appear at <path>/p/{username}</path> for anyone with the link.
settings.noModules: You don’t have any modules yet. Create a player or coach module from the dashboard.
settings.visibilityPublic: Anyone with the link can view
settings.notificationsBody: Email and push alerts when a coach attributes a clip, issues a verification, or invites you to a roster.
settings.parentalBody: If you manage a minor’s profile, you’ll be able to require consent for new attributions, set default visibility, and approve verifications from this section.

announcement.title: PLAYBACK × PlayerData
announcement.description: Elite GPS tracking, now standard for every Academy player.

header.metaDescription: PLAYBACK is the Operating System for Sports. AI match recordings, highlights, analytics, academy management, and player profiles for 75,000+ players across 25+ clubs in 10+ countries.
header.ogDescription: The Operating System for Sports. AI match recordings, highlights, analytics, academy management, and player profiles.
header.tagline: Every match filmed. Every stat tracked. Every player seen.
header.subtitle: PLAYBACK gives all players access to the same tech professionals use - across 25+ clubs in 10+ countries.

clubs.headline: The last partner you’ll ever need.
clubs.body: AI, software, media, and cloud - all built in-house. Layered on top of best-in-class hardware from the likes of Veo, Spiideo, and Clutch. One operating system for every team, season, and venue.
clubs.bullet1: In-house AI, software, and cloud architecture
clubs.bullet3: Elite hardware included - Veo, Spiideo, Clutch, GameCam, Hudl, FairVision, PlayerData

players.headline: Access the Moment.
players.body: Our AI captures every match, clips every goal, and builds the profile scouts can actually find. The same tech pros rely on, put to work for the 99% who play.
players.bullet2: PLAYBACK Profile - the LinkedIn for Sports
players.bullet3: GPS, analytics, and match graphics built in

coaches.headline: Video, GPS, Ops - one stack.
coaches.body: Our software replaces the six tools most coaches stitch together. Tagging, analytics, clip distribution, player data - one interface, built by us to work together.
coaches.bullet1: AI match tagging and instant video breakdowns
coaches.bullet2: GPS, events, and benchmarks per player
coaches.bullet4: Automated clip delivery to players and parents

academy.title: Every match, every moment, every player.
academy.body: The subscription that turns an academy season into a professional-grade showcase. Match recordings, AI highlights, GPS data, and a player profile scouts can find.
academy.feature4: Match recordings via Veo, Spiideo, Clutch
academy.imageAlt: PLAYBACK Player Profile - the LinkedIn for Sports surface

tournament.title: Run the trophy day everyone remembers.
tournament.body: AI cameras, automatic match capture, and shareable clips for every fixture - the same tech trusted by Inter Milan, Roma, and Brentford. Charity cups to 11s leagues, covered.
tournament.feature2: AI highlight detection and clip export
tournament.imageAlt: PLAYBACK-powered match broadcast from a tournament fixture

contact.title: Join the Network.
contact.errorRateLimited: You're sending too quickly. Try again in a minute.

contact.success: Thanks - we’ll be in touch shortly.

meta.title: PLAYSCANNER — Book Sports Courts & Pitches

meta.ogDescription: Aggregated court and pitch booking across providers. Compare prices in real time.
